[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001101 3
1 00011101 4
2 01010000 2
3 01010000 2
4 00011000 2
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00001000 1

01 10 00000000 a match 5 6
12 21 01100000 2
23 32 00000001 1
34 43 00001101 3 match 0
45 54 00011101 4 match 1
56 65 01010000 2 match 2 3
67 76 01010000 2 match 2 3
70 07 00011000 2 match 4

02 20 00010010 2
13 31 10000100 2
24 42 00010001 2
35 53 10001101 4
46 64 00010000 1
57 75 11011101 6
60 06 00010000 1
71 17 11000100 3

03 30 00001000 1 match 7
14 41 00000100 1
25 52 01110011 5
36 63 00000000 a match 5 6
47 74 00011101 4 match 1
50 05 00011010 3
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 01010001 3

04 40 00011000 2 match 4
15 51 11100100 4
26 62 01010000 2 match 2 3
37 73 10001101 4
